zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Hussey of Harting於大約1340年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Marcus Hussey26歲，母親Margery de Verdun31歲。他和Margeria Holbrook至少有2個女兒。他去世於1408年7月12日在英國英格蘭肯特希廷波恩享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾福林達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Hussey of Harting于大约1340年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Marcus Hussey26岁，母亲Margery de Verdun31岁。他和Margeria Holbrook至少有2个女儿。他去世于1408年7月12日在英国英格兰肯特希廷波恩享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾福林達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hussey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a nickname for someone who habitually wore a distinctive pair of boots or gaiters, from Old French hosed, hoset, housé, Middle English hosey, hus(s)y,‘booted, gaitered’ (from Latin hosatus).

English: status name or nickname from Middle English hus(e)wyf ‘mistress of a family; wife of a householder’ (a compound of Old English hūs ‘house’ + wīf ‘woman’). Though originally a woman's name, it is often found as a male surname, presumably in a derogatory sense. The vocabulary word became hussie, with the meaning ‘disreputable woman’, in the 16th century; the surname, however, is not associated with this meaning.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’. This was the name of a bardic family associated with the Maguires of Fermanagh, also Anglicized as Oswell or Oswald .

variants.name: Hosea
meanings: English: variant of   Hussey  . Similarity with the Old Testament prophet's name Hosea (see 3 below) is accidental.
English: in Scotland, where the name is more common, it is sometimes a variant of   Hosie  , itself a form of   Hussey  , or else a variant of   Hossack  .
African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the Biblical personal name Hosea. In the Old Testament, Hosea was a prophet who married a prostitute in order to illustrate Israel's unfaithfulness to God.

variants.name: Hosie
meanings: Scottish (northeast Scotland): variant of Irish   Hussey  .

variants.name: Oswell
meanings: Irish (Ulster): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’ (see Hussey ).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Hussey of Harting was born about 1340, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Marcus Hussey, was 26 and his mother, Margery de Verdun, was 31. He had at least 2 daughters with Margeria Holbrook. He died on 12 July 1408, in Sittingbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Flintham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Hussey of Harting est né environ 1340, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Marcus Hussey, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margery de Verdun, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Margeria Holbrook. Il est décédé le 12 juillet 1408, à Sittingbourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Flintham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Hussey of Harting um 1340 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Marcus Hussey 26 und seine Mutter Margery de Verdun 31. Er hatte mit Margeria Holbrook mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Juli 1408 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Sittingbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Flintham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Hussey of Harting è nato il circa 1340 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Marcus Hussey, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margery de Verdun, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Margeria Holbrook. Morì il 12 luglio 1408, nel Sittingbourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Flintham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Hussey of Hartingが約1340年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Marcus Husseyは26歳，母Margery de Verdunは31歳であった。彼はMargeria Holbrookとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1408年7月12日にイギリスイギリスケントシッティングボウルンで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアフリンサムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Hussey of Harting(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Marcus Hussey(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Verdun(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Margeria Holbrook(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1408년 7월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 짓틴그보우른에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 플린섬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Hussey of Harting nasceu aproximadamente 1340, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Marcus Hussey, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Verdun, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Margeria Holbrook. Ele faleceu em 12 de julho de 1408, em Sittingbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Flintham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Hussey of Harting родился около 1340 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Marcus Hussey было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Verdun, 31. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Margeria Holbrook. Он умер 12 июля 1408 г. в местности ситтингбурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности флинтам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Hussey of Harting nació aproximadamente 1340, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Marcus Hussey, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margery de Verdun, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Margeria Holbrook.
